tracks.rawText: 4:04Galaxias en tus ojosv5.5CoverMid-tempo reggae dancehall with a laid-back one-drop kick, skanking electric rhythm guitar, bubbling organ, and deep dub-style spring reverb, Punchy metales brass section plays tight unison stabs and call-and-response riffs over syncopated bass, crisp snares, rimshots, and subtle delay throwsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Galaxias en tus ojos

tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 4:43Borrowed Sunv5.5CoverReggae rock dub metal with a sound-first intro: sub-bass rumble, reversed cymbal hit, and distant feedback before skanking offbeat guitar, Hammond organ stabs, dub delay throws, and spring-reverb snare, Heavy drop-tuned guitars and half-time double-kick explode in the chorus; gritty bass, tape echo, and dense wall-of-sound texturesPublishRemix
